domain_description: Manufacturer and online retailer of premium wireless headphones, audio hardware, and accessories.

documents.title: Return Policy & Packaging Requirements
documents.content: Customers can return unopened or opened products within 30 days of delivery for a full refund. Items must include original packaging and all accessories. Opened items missing original accessories are subject to a 15% restocking fee.

documents.title: Delivery Options & Timelines
documents.content: Standard shipping (3–5 business days) is free on orders over $50. Express shipping (1–2 business days) costs $14.99. International shipping is currently unavailable.

documents.title: Limited Hardware Coverage
documents.content: All headphones come with a 1-year limited hardware warranty covering internal component failures and manufacturing defects. Water damage beyond the IPX4 rating and physical drops are not covered.

documents.title: Factory Reset Instructions
documents.content: To factory reset Apex wireless headphones, hold the Power and Volume Down buttons simultaneously for 8 seconds until the status LED flashes red twice. This clears all paired Bluetooth devices.

documents.title: Order Cancellation Window
documents.content: Orders can be canceled or modified within 45 minutes of placement through the order status page. Once an order status changes to 'Processing', it cannot be canceled and must be returned after delivery.
